2603.29777.title: From Skeletons to Semantics: Design and Deployment of a Hybrid Edge-Based Action Detection System for Public Safety
2603.29777.paper_summary: Public spaces such as transport hubs, city centres, and event venues require timely and reliable detection of potentially violent behaviour to support public safety. While automated video analysis has made significant progress, practical deployment remains constrained by latency, privacy, and resource limitations, particularly under edge-computing conditions. This paper presents the design and demonstrator-based deployment of a hybrid edge-based action detection system that combines skeleton-based motion analysis with vision-language models for semantic scene interpretation. Skeleton-based processing enables continuous, privacy-aware monitoring with low computational overhead, while vision-language models provide contextual understanding and zero-shot reasoning capabilities for complex and previously unseen situations. Rather than proposing new recognition models, the contribution focuses on a system-level comparison of both paradigms under realistic edge constraints. The system is implemented on a GPU-enabled edge device and evaluated with respect to latency, resource usage, and operational trade-offs using a demonstrator-based setup. The results highlight the complementary strengths and limitations of motioncentric and semantic approaches and motivate a hybrid architecture that selectively augments fast skeletonbased detection with higher-level semantic reasoning. The presented system provides a practical foundation for privacy-aware, real-time video analysis in public safety applications.
2603.29777.paper_summary_zh: 公共空間如交通樞紐、城市中心和活動場地需要及時和可靠地檢測潛在的暴力行為，以支持公共安全。儘管自動化視頻分析已取得顯著進展，但在實際部署中仍受到延遲、隱私和資源限制的約束，特別是在邊緣計算條件下。本文介紹了一種混合邊緣行為檢測系統的設計和基於演示的部署，該系統結合了基於骨架的運動分析和視覺-語言模型以進行語義場景解釋。基於骨架的處理使得能夠以低計算開銷進行持續的、注重隱私的監控，而視覺-語言模型則為複雜且以前未見的情況提供了上下文理解和零樣本推理能力。該貢獻並不在於提出新的識別模型，而是聚焦於在現實邊緣約束下對這兩種範式的系統級比較。該系統在支持GPU的邊緣設備上實施，並通過基於演示的設置評估其延遲、資源使用和運營權衡。結果突顯了以運動為中心和語義方法的互補優勢和限制，並促進了一種混合架構，該架構選擇性地增強快速的基於骨架的檢測與更高級的語義推理。所提出的系統為公共安全應用中的隱私意識實時視頻分析提供了實用的基礎。
2603.29777.author: Ganen Sethupathy et.al.
2603.29777.authors: Ganen Sethupathy, Lalit Dumka, Jan Schagen
